verdict_rationale: P0–P7 checkpoints and validators on file; P5 Playwright 35/35 with stored JSON report; P4 static audit ≥88%; P6 smoke documented; P7 complete with validation-P7-marketing.json — 7A (3 SEO posts), 7B (welcome ×3 + launch blast), 7C (5 posts, LinkedIn + X). Manifest: content/PHASE7-README.md. Canonical host: https://proofdrop.pro.
gaps_and_risks: Blog/email markdown is not wired to public /blog routes unless you add routes or external publishing.
Automated validate_phase*.py scripts not in repo; validators are manual JSON stubs.

ongoing_marketing_cadence.weekly_blog: 1 post — rotate ICP keywords from spec marketing.pain_points
ongoing_marketing_cadence.weekly_social: 2 posts; approve copy before schedule (7C pattern)
